3299830.name: Hollywood Story®: Fashion Star
3299830.description:
Ever wanted to become a movie star and live a glamorous Hollywood lifestyle? Build your career, shoot movies, hang out with celebrities, and unlock different cities!

CREATE YOUR HOLLYWOOD STAR

Customize your avatar with an incredible selection of clothing options, fashion styles, hairstyles, and makeup choices. Leave your unique mark on the industry as you perfect your look, from glamorous gowns to chic streetwear!

SHOOT BLOCKBUSTERS

Land auditions, star in blockbuster films, and promote your movies to earn legions of devoted fans who will solidify your status as a megastar! From action-packed thrillers to heartwarming romances, your on-screen presence will captivate audiences worldwide!

DIVE INTO FASHION

Connect with renowned designers and flaunt exclusive couture made just for you! Experience the excitement of fashion showdowns as you take center stage, showcasing your impeccable style and trendsetting designs! Project your unique sense of style and become the ultimate fashionista!

BUILD YOUR FAN BASE

Launch your own fashion line, develop signature fragrances, and amass a dedicated fanbase! Leave an impression fit for royalty as you grace the covers of fashion magazines and inspire millions with your unparalleled elegance and charm!

DATE CELEBRITIES

Rub shoulders with Hollywood's elite at lavish parties and exclusive events—live the dream and mingle with the stars! From A-list actors to chart-topping musicians, your social circle will be brimming with excitement and glamour!

EXPLORE ICONIC LOCATIONS

Unlock new destinations like Hollywood, Beverly Hills, Manhattan, and Las Vegas as you progress! Immerse yourself in style games and explore glamorous locales, from luxurious penthouses to chic boutiques, as you soak in the glitz and glamour of the entertainment industry!

GRACE THE COVERS

With great fame comes great media frenzy! Paparazzi will be waiting outside your home, ready to snap your picture for tabloid covers. Embrace the spotlight and showcase your makeover skills to stun the world, dazzling on every magazine cover and red carpet event!

CONNECT AND SHARE

Meet new friends, visit their homes, and showcase your achievements to the world! Connect with fellow stylists and share your style tips, as you inspire and empower others to chase their dreams and conquer the world of fashion and entertainment!
